name: Zone of Truth
description: You create a 15-foot-radius Sphere within range. A creature that enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there makes a Charisma saving throw; on a failure it can't speak a deliberate lie while in the radius (it can stay silent or be evasive). You know whether each creature succeeds. Engine: a social-utility zone narrated by the AIGM.
